name: GuangDong Rifeng Electric Cable Co., Ltd.
summary: GuangDong Rifeng Electric Cable Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of cables in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company provides rubber cables, housing wires, PVC/LSOH cables, power cables, instrumentation cables, shipboard and marine cables, plugs and connectors, control cables, heavy machinery cables, communication cables, connector cables, and power cords. Its products are used in household appliances, electrical engineering, petroleum chemical industry, metallurgy, construction machinery, communications engineering, wind power, environmental protection engineering, dam embankment engineering, instrumentation, computer communications, control, and other fields. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Zhongshan, the People's Republic of China.
